title: Wrist vac
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''wrist vac''' was a weapon which was worn on the user's wrist. When triggered, the wrist vac released a number of small, deadly blades into a targets vital areas. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] once ran into a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who had one.

==Behind the scenes==
The Wrist Vac bears a striking similarity to the [[Vac Attack Mk-127/Legends|Vac Attack Mk-127]], though the book does not implicitly name a model.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]''
